info.title: dotnet-proj-diff
info.description: Calculate which projects in a solution has changed since a specific commit

options.name: --solution
options.description: Path to solution file to derive projects from

options.name: --base-ref
options.description: Base git reference to compare against, if not specified 'HEAD' will be used [default: HEAD]

options.name: --head-ref
options.description: Head git reference to compare against. If not specified current working tree will be used

options.name: --merge-base
options.description: If true instead of using --base use the merge base of --base and --head as the --base reference, if --head is not specified 'HEAD' will be used [default: True]

options.name: --include-deleted
options.description: If true deleted projects will be included in output [default: False]

options.name: --include-modified
options.description: If true modified projects will be included in output [default: True]

options.name: --include-added
options.description: If true added projects will be included in output [default: True]

options.name: --include-referencing
options.description: if true  projects referencing modified/deleted/added projects will be included in output [default: True]

options.name: --absolute-paths
options.description: Output absolute paths, if not specified paths will be relative to the working directory. Or relative to --output if specified. This option will not affect slnf format as this requires relative paths [default: False]

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format, if --output is specified format will be derived from file extension. Otherwise this defaults to 'plain'

options.name: --output
options.description: Output file, if not set stdout will be used

options.name: --ignore-changed-file
options.description: Ignore changes in specific files. If these files are a part of the build evaluation process they will still be evaluated, however these files will be considered unchanged by the diff process []

options.name: --log-level
options.description: Set the log level for the command [default: Information]

options.name: --msbuild-traversal-version
options.description: Set the version of the Microsoft.Build.Traversal SDK when using traversal output format []
